zh-CN.headlineFact: 世界杯小组赛进入生死线，伊核核查重启争议，AI监管、芯片融资与定制算力同时升温
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界一边寻找安全，一边押注下一轮增长
zh-CN.headlineFull: 世界杯小组赛进入生死线，伊核核查重启争议，AI监管、芯片融资与定制算力同时升温; 世界一边寻找安全，一边押注下一轮增长.
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯小组赛进入关键节点，瑞士、加拿大、哥伦比亚和波黑相关赛果牵动晋级形势；国际原子能机构称将恢复伊朗核查，但核查范围仍有争议。与此同时，乌克兰远程打击让克里米亚部分地区停电，欧洲热浪继续刷新纪录；英国首相继任人选逐渐清晰，美国推动Meta接受前沿模型审查，SK海力士拟赴美融资，高通与字节跳动的定制芯片谈判也浮出水面。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天最值得看的，不是某一条新闻更响，而是安全、能源、气候、权力和算力几条线同时在收紧。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 球场在算分，核查员在排日程，芯片厂在算钱，模型公司在等审查，世界像一台后台全开的电脑。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：晋级、核查、能源前线、极端高温、权力交接、模型审查、AI资本与定制芯片。

en-US.headlineFact: World Cup group-stage pressure rose, Iran inspection disputes returned, and AI regulation, chip financing, and custom compute all heated up
en-US.headlineView: the world is seeking safety while betting heavily on the next growth engine
en-US.headlineFull: World Cup group-stage pressure rose, Iran inspection disputes returned, and AI regulation, chip financing, and custom compute all heated up; the world is seeking safety while betting heavily on the next growth engine.
en-US.intro: Over the past 24 hours, World Cup group-stage results reshaped knockout scenarios involving Switzerland, Canada, Colombia, and Bosnia and Herzegovina. The IAEA said Iran inspections will resume, though the scope remains disputed. Ukraine’s long-range strikes disrupted power in Crimea, Europe’s heatwave kept breaking records, Britain’s leadership transition moved closer to Andy Burnham, Washington pressed Meta on frontier-model reviews, SK Hynix prepared a major U.S. listing, and Qualcomm was reported to be discussing custom chip-design work with ByteDance.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The point today is not one louder headline, but several systems tightening at once: security, energy, climate, power, and compute.
en-US.doudouQuote: The pitch is counting points, inspectors are setting schedules, chipmakers are counting capital, and model companies are waiting for review. The world has too many background processes open.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Keywords: qualification, inspections, energy front lines, extreme heat, leadership transition, model review, AI capital, and custom chips.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 瑞士与哥伦比亚在小组赛末段抢到关键位置
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正决定命运的，是能否把场面优势兑现成积分
zh-CN.headlineFull: 瑞士与哥伦比亚在小组赛末段抢到关键位置; 真正决定命运的，是能否把场面优势兑现成积分.
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间6月24日05:00至6月25日05:00窗口内，世界杯小组赛进入第三轮与第二轮交错的关键时段。克罗地亚1:0击败巴拿马，哥伦比亚1:0击败刚果（金）；B组方面，公开赛况显示瑞士、加拿大、波黑和卡塔尔的末轮结果牵动小组头名与第三名出线形势。由于不同公开页面更新时间不一致，本条按已核验来源保守呈现赛果与趋势，不把未更新页面当作最终官方表。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 世界杯日报最怕只看比分，真正的信息在于谁已经安全，谁还要等别人脸色。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 有些球队赢一场就上岸，有些球队赢了还要看小组数学题，世界杯也是大型表格软件。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 24小时关键词：哥伦比亚晋级、克罗地亚续命、B组出线计算。

en-US.headlineFact: Switzerland and Colombia moved into key positions as the group stage tightened
en-US.headlineView: the decisive question is whether territorial control can be converted into points
en-US.headlineFull: Switzerland and Colombia moved into key positions as the group stage tightened; the decisive question is whether territorial control can be converted into points.
en-US.intro: Between 05:00 on June 24 and 05:00 on June 25 Beijing time, the World Cup moved into a decisive stretch of group-stage play. Croatia beat Panama 1-0 and Colombia beat DR Congo 1-0. In Group B, public match coverage showed Switzerland, Canada, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Qatar reshaping the race for first place and possible third-place qualification. Because public result pages were updating at different speeds, this item reports only the verified results and the qualification trend rather than overstating an unrefreshed table as final.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A World Cup daily should not only read scores. The real signal is who is safe and who must wait for other results.
en-US.doudouQuote: Some teams win and land safely. Others win and still need a spreadsheet. The World Cup is also a tournament of math.
en-US.footerTakeaway: 24-hour keywords: Colombia through, Croatia alive, Group B qualification math.

sources.title: Bosnia and Herzegovina v Qatar live report

zh-CN.headlineFact: 国际原子能机构称伊朗核查即将恢复，伊朗却为关键设施设置前提
zh-CN.headlineView: 真正能够维持和平的，不只是承诺，而是承诺能否被验证
zh-CN.headlineFull: 国际原子能机构称伊朗核查即将恢复，伊朗却为关键设施设置前提; 真正能够维持和平的，不只是承诺，而是承诺能否被验证.
zh-CN.intro: 国际原子能机构总干事格罗西表示，美伊临时和平安排已经明确核活动需要监督，机构将很快与伊朗商定核查的时间、程序和地点。但伊朗方面称，遭袭核设施和相关核材料的核查仍需等待最终协议及美国实际解除制裁。双方同意继续谈判，但核查范围、顺序和执行条件仍是和平安排能否落地的关键。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 停火解决的是枪声，核查解决的才是信任。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 谈判桌上说“相信我”很容易，真正难的是让别人带着仪器进门看。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：核查安排是否能从政治承诺进入可执行流程。

en-US.headlineFact: The IAEA says Iran inspections will resume, while Tehran sets conditions for key sites
en-US.headlineView: what sustains peace is not only a promise, but whether that promise can be verified
en-US.headlineFull: The IAEA says Iran inspections will resume, while Tehran sets conditions for key sites; what sustains peace is not only a promise, but whether that promise can be verified.
en-US.intro: IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi said inspections in Iran will take place under the interim U.S.-Iran arrangement and that dates, procedures, and locations will be worked out soon. Iranian officials, however, said inspections of struck nuclear facilities and related material must wait for a final agreement and practical U.S. sanctions relief. The talks continue, but scope, sequencing, and implementation remain the test of whether the peace framework can become operational.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A ceasefire quiets the guns. Inspections are what rebuild trust.
en-US.doudouQuote: It is easy to say “trust me” at the table. The hard part is letting someone walk in with instruments.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether inspection arrangements move from political language to executable procedure.

sources.title: IAEA chief says Iran inspections will go ahead, working on modalities

zh-CN.headlineFact: 乌克兰无人机造成塞瓦斯托波尔停电，俄罗斯燃料系统持续承压
zh-CN.headlineView: 远程战争正在把电网、炼厂和运输线全部变成前线
zh-CN.headlineFull: 乌克兰无人机造成塞瓦斯托波尔停电，俄罗斯燃料系统持续承压; 远程战争正在把电网、炼厂和运输线全部变成前线.
zh-CN.intro: 乌克兰对俄罗斯控制的克里米亚发动无人机袭击，公开报道显示塞瓦斯托波尔出现大范围停电，公共交通和城市运行受到影响。与此同时，乌克兰继续把打击重点放在能源、炼油和运输节点上，俄罗斯部分地区的燃料供应也承受压力。战争前线不再只是地图上的接触线，也包括一座城市能否维持电力、燃料和基本服务。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 现代战争争夺的不只是阵地，也是让城市继续运转的能力。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前看前线看战壕，现在还要看变电站、油库和公交车能不能发车。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：能源基础设施是否继续成为双方远程打击的核心目标。

en-US.headlineFact: Ukrainian drones caused power outages in Sevastopol as Russia’s fuel system stayed under pressure
en-US.headlineView: long-range war is turning grids, refineries, and transport lines into front lines
en-US.headlineFull: Ukrainian drones caused power outages in Sevastopol as Russia’s fuel system stayed under pressure; long-range war is turning grids, refineries, and transport lines into front lines.
en-US.intro: Ukrainian strikes on Russian-held Crimea triggered reported power outages in Sevastopol and disrupted parts of urban life and transport. At the same time, Kyiv has continued targeting energy, refining, and logistics nodes, adding pressure to fuel supply in parts of Russia. The front line is no longer only the contact line on a map; it is also whether a city can keep electricity, fuel, and basic services running.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Modern war is not only about holding ground. It is also about keeping cities functioning.
en-US.doudouQuote: The front used to mean trenches. Now it also means substations, fuel depots, and whether buses can run.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether energy infrastructure remains a central target of long-range strikes.

sources.title: Ukraine war briefing: Crimea locks down as Putin acknowledges Ukrainian drones

zh-CN.headlineFact: 欧洲“欧米伽热穹顶”继续刷新高温纪录，英法学校、交通和电力承压
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候危机不是未来时，而是今天的停课、停电与停运
zh-CN.headlineFull: 欧洲“欧米伽热穹顶”继续刷新高温纪录，英法学校、交通和电力承压; 气候危机不是未来时，而是今天的停课、停电与停运.
zh-CN.intro: 西欧持续遭遇极端热浪。英国录得36.1℃并刷新六月最高气温纪录，法国多地高温接近或超过40℃，学校关闭、列车限速、活动取消和电力系统降载同时出现。高温最直接的影响不是抽象曲线，而是城市基础服务突然变得脆弱：孩子能不能上课，老人能不能降温，电网和交通能不能扛住。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 城市真正的韧性，是天气突破纪录时，生活仍能安全继续。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 热浪一来，空调、电网、学校、火车全都参加压力测试。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：欧洲城市是否把极端高温当作基础设施问题，而不只是天气新闻。

en-US.headlineFact: Europe’s omega heat dome kept breaking records and strained schools, transport, and power systems
en-US.headlineView: the climate crisis is not future tense; it is today’s school closures, outages, and service disruption
en-US.headlineFull: Europe’s omega heat dome kept breaking records and strained schools, transport, and power systems; the climate crisis is not future tense; it is today’s school closures, outages, and service disruption.
en-US.intro: Western Europe remained under an extreme heatwave. The U.K. recorded 36.1 C, its hottest June day, while parts of France approached or exceeded 40 C. School closures, rail speed restrictions, cancelled events, and power-system stress appeared together. The direct cost of heat is not an abstract curve; it is the sudden fragility of daily services, from classrooms and care for older people to grids and transport.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Real urban resilience means life can remain safe when weather breaks records.
en-US.doudouQuote: When the heat arrives, air conditioning, grids, schools, and trains all sit the same stress test.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether European cities treat extreme heat as infrastructure policy, not just weather news.

sources.title: UK records its hottest June day and France heatwave coverage

zh-CN.headlineFact: 斯塔默核心盟友转而支持伯纳姆，英国首相交接可能接近无竞争产生
zh-CN.headlineView: 领导人更替越频繁，政策稳定性就越重要
zh-CN.headlineFull: 斯塔默核心盟友转而支持伯纳姆，英国首相交接可能接近无竞争产生; 领导人更替越频繁，政策稳定性就越重要.
zh-CN.intro: 英国首相斯塔默宣布辞职后，前大曼彻斯特市长安迪·伯纳姆成为工党领导人和首相继任的主要人选。斯塔默的重要盟友达伦·琼斯公开表示不会参选并支持伯纳姆，称已就经济增长和适度扩大借贷空间获得对方说明。如果没有其他强有力候选人加入，英国可能在短时间内完成又一次首相交接。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 权力可以快速交接，但市场和普通人需要的是可预期的方向。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 首相可以换得很快，房贷、工资和账单可没法跟着每天换剧本。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：伯纳姆是否能在接任前给出清晰经济路线。

en-US.headlineFact: A Starmer ally backed Andy Burnham, making Britain’s leadership handover look closer to uncontested
en-US.headlineView: the more often leaders change, the more policy stability matters
en-US.headlineFull: A Starmer ally backed Andy Burnham, making Britain’s leadership handover look closer to uncontested; the more often leaders change, the more policy stability matters.
en-US.intro: After Keir Starmer announced his resignation, former Greater Manchester mayor Andy Burnham became the leading candidate to succeed him as Labour leader and prime minister. Darren Jones, a key Starmer ally, said he would not run and endorsed Burnham after discussing economic growth and possible borrowing room. If no strong rival enters, Britain may complete another prime-ministerial transition quickly.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Power can transfer fast, but markets and households need a predictable direction.
en-US.doudouQuote: Prime ministers can change quickly. Mortgages, wages, and bills cannot rewrite themselves every day.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether Burnham offers a clear economic path before taking office.

sources.title: Darren Jones backs Burnham to be next UK PM
Andy Burnham inches closer to UK premiership
sources.publisher: Associated Press via Times of Israel

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国推动Meta在发布前提交前沿AI模型接受审查
zh-CN.headlineView: 模型能力越强，产品发布就越像一次安全许可
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国推动Meta在发布前提交前沿AI模型接受审查; 模型能力越强，产品发布就越像一次安全许可.
zh-CN.intro: 据《纽约时报》报道并由Reuters转述，美国政府正推动Meta签署自愿协议，在部分前沿AI模型正式发布或提供给合作伙伴前，允许政府评估其能力、漏洞和国家安全风险。OpenAI、Anthropic等公司已经参与相关测试。Meta表示认同提升前沿AI安全性的目标，仍在讨论细节。AI产品发布正在从“上线功能”变成“证明风险可控”。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 过去发布软件看功能和Bug，未来发布模型还要评估它可能被谁、用来做什么。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前发版怕崩溃，现在还怕模型太聪明、聪明到需要先被检查。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：自愿审查会不会变成事实上的行业准入门槛。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. pressed Meta to submit frontier AI models for pre-release review
en-US.headlineView: the stronger the model, the more product launch starts to resemble a safety clearance
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. pressed Meta to submit frontier AI models for pre-release review; the stronger the model, the more product launch starts to resemble a safety clearance.
en-US.intro: According to a New York Times report carried by Reuters, the U.S. government is pressing Meta to sign a voluntary agreement allowing federal review of certain frontier AI models before release or partner access. The review would assess capabilities, vulnerabilities, and national-security risks. OpenAI, Anthropic, and others have already participated in related testing. Meta said it shares the goal of improving frontier AI safety while details remain under discussion.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Software releases used to be about features and bugs. Model releases increasingly ask who might use the system and for what.
en-US.doudouQuote: A release used to fail if it crashed. Now a model may be too capable to ship without being checked first.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether voluntary review becomes a de facto gate for the industry.

sources.title: US presses Meta to agree to AI reviews as security concerns rise

zh-CN.headlineFact: SK海力士计划通过纳斯达克存托凭证上市融资约294亿美元
zh-CN.headlineView: AI竞争正在从卖芯片，升级为用资本市场建设下一代芯片工厂
zh-CN.headlineFull: SK海力士计划通过纳斯达克存托凭证上市融资约294亿美元; AI竞争正在从卖芯片，升级为用资本市场建设下一代芯片工厂.
zh-CN.intro: 韩国存储芯片企业SK海力士计划在纳斯达克发行美国存托凭证，市场报道估值约294亿至297亿美元。公司是高带宽内存的重要供应商，受益于英伟达等AI数据中心需求增长。融资预期将用于新工厂和先进生产设备。AI芯片竞争不只发生在设计图纸上，也发生在谁能更快把资本变成产能。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI的下一场竞争，不只是谁设计出更强的芯片，也是看谁有钱把芯片大规模造出来。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 芯片公司现在不只拼技术，还拼谁能把资本市场也变成生产线。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：HBM需求是否继续支撑先进存储产能扩张。

en-US.headlineFact: SK Hynix planned a Nasdaq ADR listing valued around $29.4 billion
en-US.headlineView: AI competition is moving from selling chips to financing the factories that make the next generation
en-US.headlineFull: SK Hynix planned a Nasdaq ADR listing valued around $29.4 billion; AI competition is moving from selling chips to financing the factories that make the next generation.
en-US.intro: South Korean memory-chip maker SK Hynix plans to list American depositary receipts on Nasdaq, with market reports valuing the offering around $29.4 billion to $29.7 billion. The company is a major supplier of high-bandwidth memory used in AI data centers, including by Nvidia-linked supply chains. Proceeds are expected to support new fabrication capacity and advanced equipment. AI chip competition is not only about design; it is also about who can turn capital into capacity fastest.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The next AI contest is not only who designs the stronger chip, but who can afford to build it at scale.
en-US.doudouQuote: Chip companies are no longer only competing on technology. They are trying to turn capital markets into production lines.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether HBM demand keeps justifying advanced memory expansion.

sources.title: SK Hynix plans depository receipt listing on Nasdaq

zh-CN.headlineFact: 高通被曝正与字节跳动商谈定制芯片设计
zh-CN.headlineView: 当通用芯片无法满足需求，平台公司就会开始定义自己的算力架构
zh-CN.headlineFull: 高通被曝正与字节跳动商谈定制芯片设计; 当通用芯片无法满足需求，平台公司就会开始定义自己的算力架构.
zh-CN.intro: Reuters援引知情人士称，高通正在与字节跳动商谈提供定制芯片设计服务，可能涉及视频处理单元，并计划在条件成熟时于年底前进入量产阶段。谈判仍在进行，尚不确定是否会形成最终产品。若合作达成，字节跳动将成为高通定制芯片业务的重要早期客户，也说明在中美科技限制持续存在的背景下，商业合作与技术竞争仍在同时发生。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 真正的算力自主，不只是买到多少芯片，而是能不能让芯片按照自己的业务需要生长。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 平台公司做大以后，连芯片都想要“私人订制”。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 看点：定制芯片是否成为大型平台降低算力成本的新路径。

en-US.headlineFact: Qualcomm was reported to be in talks with ByteDance on custom chip-design services
en-US.headlineView: when general-purpose chips are not enough, platform companies start defining their own compute architecture
en-US.headlineFull: Qualcomm was reported to be in talks with ByteDance on custom chip-design services; when general-purpose chips are not enough, platform companies start defining their own compute architecture.
en-US.intro: Reuters reported, citing people familiar with the matter, that Qualcomm is in talks to provide custom chip-design services to ByteDance, potentially involving video-processing units and possible production by year-end if conditions are met. The talks are ongoing and may not produce a final chip. If completed, ByteDance would become an important early customer for Qualcomm’s custom-chip business, showing that commercial cooperation and strategic technology competition can continue at the same time.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Real compute independence is not only buying chips. It is whether chips can grow around your own workload.
en-US.doudouQuote: Once a platform gets large enough, even chips start looking like custom orders.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Watch point: whether custom silicon becomes a new way for large platforms to lower compute costs.

sources.title: Qualcomm in talks to provide custom chip-design services to ByteDance
